UNCONTESTED CALENDAR OF AUG-06-2013, NOTICE OF HEARING FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT GRANTED PER WRITTEN ORDER. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: SONIA WONG, CSR#11288. (514)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BALL, MARCELL AN INDIVIDUAL $12,208.53 PRINCIPAL, $2,500.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $848.04 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $15,556.57, IT IS FURTHER ORDERED AND ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST MAINTAINS A PERFECTED SECURITY INTEREST IN THAT CERTAIN 2003 FREIGHTLINER CENTURY, VIN#1FUJBBCG93PK23497 IDENTIFIED IN THE COMPLAINT ON FILE HEREIN IS THE RIGHTFUL OWNER THEREOF, IS ENTITLED TO ITS IMMEDIATE POSSESSION, AND THAT PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER SAID PROPERTY FROM DEFENDANT. IN THE EVENT THAT PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST OBTAINS POSSESSION OF AND SELLS SAID PERSONAL PROPERTY HEREAFTER, DEFENDANTS SHALL RECEIVE ALL CREDITS TO WHICH THEY ARE ENTITLED BY LAW. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-29-2013 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-31-2013 Continued To Sep-18-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Hearing For Entry Of Default Judgment
Off Calendar Aug-06-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Paul Alvarado, Clerk: Mars Goodman and Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Marc T. Cefalu, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Bak of the West
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Marcell Ball, an individual
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Declaration of Donald Lee on file.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $12,208.53
Attorney's Fees: $2,500.00
Costs: $848.04
Total Judgment in the amount of $15,556.57
Other: It is further Ordered and Adjudged that Plaintiff Bank of The West maintains a perfected security interest in that certain 2003 Freightliner Century, VIN#1FUJBBCG93PK23497 identified in the Complaint on file herein is the rightful owner thereof, is entitled to its immediate possession, and that plaintiff have and recover said property from defendant. In the event that plaintiff Bank of the West obtains possession of and sells said personal property hereafter, defendants shall receive all credits wo which they are entitled by law.
Judgment signed in open court.

Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-27-2013 Continued To Aug-14-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
